# SRC031 - Agentic AI in Advertising Guide

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | AI Marketing |
| Authors / source | Amazon Ads |
| Year | 2026 |
| Source type | Platform/practitioner guide |
| Quality | Medium |
| URL | [https://advertising.amazon.com/library/guides/agentic-ai](https://advertising.amazon.com/library/guides/agentic-ai) |

## Bias / limitation

Platform commercial framing.

## Core takeaway

Agentic AI is framed as autonomous planning and execution with marketing applications.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use as industry-language mapping, not independent proof.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.

## Research extraction template

```markdown
### Source extraction

- Source ID: SRC031
- What it changes about our strategy:
- What it proves:
- What it does not prove:
- Ad tactic suggested:
- Landing page proof suggested:
- Measurement implication:
- Follow-up source needed:
```
